ohtani.title: Jazz Chisholm Jr. homers, lifts Yankees vs. Dodgers
ohtani.blurb: Jazz Chisholm Jr. drives a go-ahead home run in the 8th inning to lift the Yankees to a 2-1 win against the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Imanaga, Hoerner lead Cubs to 10-1 win
imanaga.blurb: Seven shutout innings from Shota Imanaga, and a two-hit, four-RBI day from Nico Hoerner propel the Cubs to a 10-1 win over the Twins

suzuki.title: Imanaga, Hoerner lead Cubs to 10-1 win
suzuki.blurb: Seven shutout innings from Shota Imanaga, and a two-hit, four-RBI day from Nico Hoerner propel the Cubs to a 10-1 win over the Twins

yoshida.title: Wilyer Abreu's two homers spark Red Sox's comeback win
yoshida.blurb: Wilyer Abreu hits two home runs and Jahmai Jones hits his first Red Sox homer to propel Boston to a 7-6 comeback win over the Rays

okamoto.title: Sean Burke's scoreless outing leads to White Sox win
okamoto.blurb: Sean Burke tosses 6 2/3 scoreless innings and Colston Montgomery homers during the White Sox 3-0 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Sean Burke's scoreless outing leads to White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Sean Burke tosses 6 2/3 scoreless innings and Colston Montgomery homers during the White Sox 3-0 win over the Blue Jays

matsui.title: Merrill, France power Padres past Royals
matsui.blurb: The Padres combine to hit five home runs and defeat the Royals in dominant fashion, 19-2
